code: import React,{createContext,useContext,useEffect,useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const PreloadContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext(undefined);export const PreloadProvider=_ref=>{let{children}=_ref;const[user,setUser]=useState(null);const[corporations,setCorporations]=useState([]);const[inventory,setInventory]=useState([]);const refresh=async()=>{try{const[userRes,corpRes,invRes]=await Promise.all([fetch("/api/user").then(res=>res.json()),fetch("/api/corporations").then(res=>res.json()),fetch(`/api/inventory/${(user===null||user===void 0?void 0:user.id)||0}`).then(res=>res.json())]);setUser(userRes.user);setCorporations(corpRes.corporations);setInventory(invRes.items||[]);}catch(err){console.error("Error loading preload data",err);}};useEffect(()=>{refresh();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(PreloadContext.Provider,{value:{user,corporations,inventory,refresh},children:children});};export const usePreload=()=>{const ctx=useContext(PreloadContext);if(!ctx)throw new Error("usePreload must be used within a PreloadProvider");return ctx;};
